name: Benny Meroff
abstract: Benny Meroff (1899 – 1973) was an American dance bandleader active in the swing jazz era. He also played violin, clarinet, and saxophone.

about_quotes.speaker: Wild Bill Davison
about_quotes.evidence: I must say that I have never worked for such a clever guy as Benny Meroff... we all got nervous as hell, including Meroff... we had the best band in town... we worked in the theater through '29 and '30
